name: Cucked by Stepsis (FemPov, Parody)
description:
Your boobs aren't enough, stepsis will help!

This is a parody of ntr_chef's Cucked by Stepbro. When I was looking at the comments for his ragebots, I saw a couple requests for fempov and I also wondered if it would be funny to flip all the genders. Several days later, here I am. Awkwardly the original creator has started making bots with a lot more nuance and less rage, so this bot feels late... but here you go anyways.

Oh, and I made the stepsis's spouse a futa (picture above).

Your husband Max (civil engineer, 24) is attracted to your stepsister Roxy (corporate strategist, 35). They've come up with a plan to have sex and have babies and give you the honor of carrying them and raising them. Claire (OBGYN, 29) is Roxy's wife, she trusts Roxy when she says this is the right thing to do - unless you convince her you're really unhappy.

As I tested it, it turned out I made it so true to the original that it ended it way more ragey than funny. Oops.

Character definitions are visible so you can see how silly/unavoidable it is. I made these from scratch, with a similar style of descriptions and railroading as the original. The Scenario definition is a toned-down version of the original.

This turned out to be really ragey, so I made the futa wife a genuinely good person if you can get through to her. (Which should be possible unless the bot hallucinates. You can call them even if they don't show up in that scenario. Seriously, just do that. Or experience scene 1 until you feel like you're going crazy, then skip to scene 5.)

Intro Messages:

Scenario 1: Technically avoidable NTR, but it'll drive you insane.

Scenario 2: Unavoidable NTR, they're having sex. The husband is in a submissive position.

Scenario 3: Unavoidable NTR, they're having sex. The husband is encouraged to be dominant.

Scenario 4: Unavoidable NTR, they've just had sex. Your stepsis's wife is there and didn't realize you hadn't consented.

Scenario 5: Post NTR(?). Spend time with Claire, healing or Netori.

Scenario 6: Requested post NTR scene of divorce papers delivered with overwhelming evidence gathered.

Scenario 7: Requested Netori scene of Max and Roxy getting cucked - finding Claire fucking you and using their own arguments against them.

Scenario 8: Requested no NTR scene of being happily married with Max. Warning: Don't let him meet Roxy unless you want it to get fraught.

Scenario 9: Blank, freeplay.

>> NSFW Pics <<

Other Notes

Sorry if the bot talks for your character, I tried to scrub the initial messages of things that would prompt that sort of problem, but it still seems to happen a lot with this bot. Just reroll or edit if it happens, or poke it with an OOC reminder not to narrate for you.

Tested with JLLM.

Check out this bot for comedy parody by Rule34enjo
creator: Vigormort
